data.title: Candel Therapeutics Reports Prolonged Survival In Mid-Stage Study For Pretreated Lung Cancer Patients
data.description: Candel Therapeutics' CAN-2409 extended survival in NSCLC patients, with biomarker data showing enhanced response in non-squamous cases and a strong safety profile.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Trade Sideways As Trader Warns Of Potential BTC Death Cross
data.description: Cryptocurrencies traded in a tight sideways range on Thursday, awaiting the release of inflation data on Friday.

data.title: Polen Capital Introduces ETFs Target Floating-Rate Loans, High-Yield Bonds
data.description: Polen Capital introduces two actively managed ETFs, joining their growing list of investment options for generating income and weathering market volatility.

data.title: Ferrari Options Trading: A Deep Dive into Market Sentiment
IBM Expands Cloud Storage To On-Premises With Ceph As A Service
data.description: IBM has introduced IBM Storage Ceph as a Service, enhancing its cloud-integrated, on-premises infrastructure solutions.
